case_title: AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC VS. AMIN COOLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISH UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OR NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1222 HARRISON STREET #1402, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $133.08 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $455.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $900.00 AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT ( UNLAWFUL DETAINER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC SERVED NOV-16-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-16-2016 AS TO DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC
DECLARATION OF SEON RIESLAND IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOLEY, AMIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $1,958.71 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $455.00 COSTS, $9,315.60 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $900.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,254.31, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
